title: IDS and Network Security
partialNote: This is a partial chapter (~15 pages). Read only the sections listed below. The remaining sections are covered in depth in IS3523 (Security Architecture).
focusAreas: Pay special attention to IDS Models and False Positives/Negatives. Understanding detection methodology helps you interpret the traffic patterns you’ll analyze in Lab 3.3.
secplus: Domain 3.2 (Network Security Design), Domain 4.1 (Security Assessment Tools)
